title: Vinaa Vinaa Song Lyrics Papanasam
stanzas:
vina vina orey vina
vidaamaley ezhum vina
Nirai vuraa orey kanna
iraivanna manithanaa

aattril sellum neeril
netrin vellam yaethu
netrellam maayaiye

soorai kaatrin oodaai
saayaa naanar kaadaai
vendum or menmaiye

vina vina orey vina
vidaamaley ezhum vina

sikkumaa sikkumaa silanthi
thaan amaitha  than valayil.
sikkuthae sikkuthe manathu
paavam enum poi valayil.

ammai appan kaakkum pillai
aayul nooru vaazhum
immai seitha nanmai nanmai
theemai kondru kaakkum.

anbe, uyariyaa avanam
seitha aram nammai kaathidum

vina vina orey vina
vidaamaley ezhum vina
Nirai vuraa orey kanna
iraivanna manithanaa

kathiyaa buthiya irandil
velvathedhu sol manamey
buthiye buthiye ulagil
velkindra ayuthamae.

paarai meley thaerai ponaal
paatha suvadu illaye
vaerai polae unmai kooda
veliyae vanthaal thollauye
kooraa manamey ragasiyam
Ulagil urave avasiam

vina vina orey vina
vidaamaley ezhum vina
Nirai vuraa orey kanna
iraivanna manithanaa

aattril sellum neeril
netrin vellam yaethu
netrellam maayaiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Vinaa Vinaa?

The song Vinaa Vinaa explores themes of longing and connection, reflecting deep emotional sentiments.

How does Vinaa Vinaa fit into the plot of Papanasam?

In Papanasam, Vinaa Vinaa underscores pivotal moments of emotional turmoil and love between characters.

Who is the singer and music director of Vinaa Vinaa?

The song is sung by Hariharan and composed by M Ghibran.

When was Vinaa Vinaa released?

Vinaa Vinaa was released on July 3, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vinaa Vinaa, the protagonist expresses a deep yearning for connection, encapsulating the emotional core of Papanasam. The song's soothing melody, paired with Hariharan's evocative vocals, creates a poignant atmosphere that resonates with listeners. It beautifully conveys the complexities of love and longing, making it a memorable piece in the film's narrative. The lyrics reflect a blend of hope and melancholy, inviting the audience to immerse themselves in its emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vinaa Vinaa from Papanasam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Hariharan's soulful vocals and M Ghibran's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical beauty that makes this track a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Oh, without any other sound, the one sound rises, the sound of the flute, oh God, is it a human being?
In the water that flows in the river, everything is an illusion.
The wind of the flute needs to be heard, it must be a true essence.
Don't listen to the noise, our light is shining.
Oh, without any other sound, the one sound rises.
Is it a struggle? Is it a silence that brings peace? The mind is troubled by the lie of being innocent.
The child protected by mother and father lives a hundred years, doing good deeds and protecting from evil.
Oh beloved, the one who does good will protect us.
Oh, without any other sound, the one sound rises, the sound of the flute, oh God, is it a human being?
In the water that flows in the river, everything is an illusion.
The wind of the flute needs to be heard, it must be a true essence.
Don't listen to the noise, our light is shining.
